# Setback

> Setback generates a US construction-permit roadmap from an address and job description in about 60 seconds — every permit, every agency, jurisdiction-specific rejection risks, a realistic timeline, and a submission-ready permit narrative. The $97 tier adds a branded Client Packet a contractor hands the homeowner and a City Submission Pack for filing. Any trade, any US location, no account required.

Setback is not legal advice and does not replace an official agency determination. See /disclaimer.html.

## Product
- [Get a roadmap](index.html): the main tool — describe a project and location, get a permit roadmap
- Pricing, one time, no subscription: $49 Quote-Ready Roadmap, $97 The Bid Packet (adds the Client Packet + City Submission Pack + feasibility/cost/risk/AI advisor), $299 Bid Pack (5 bid packets), shown in full on [Get a roadmap](index.html)
- [For permit expediters](expediters.html): prepaid packs for expediting firms, $549/15 roadmaps or $1,499/50 roadmaps, white-label
- [How it works](how-it-works.html): what the roadmap is based on, and what to independently confirm

## Policies
- [Terms of Service](terms.html)
- [Privacy Policy](privacy.html)
